purpose: T-16 behavior-preservation fixture corpus. Decision-equivalence baseline for Plan 80/81 SP01. Fixtures evaluate ~/.claude/hooks/pre-write-guard.sh R-32 (frontmatter type allowlist Tier 2 DENY) + R-47 (tag-presence advisory Tier 1) + R-32 tag-prefix DENY (Tier 2). Snapshot decisions PRE-refactor; T-6 refactor MUST produce decision-equivalent results across this corpus (zero unjustified divergences).
_session_scope_note: Initial 25 fixtures authored 2026-05-07 SP01 build session. Full ≥70-fixture corpus per packet §3.7 deferred to next session — current corpus covers the key R-32 + R-47 decision classes representatively. Adversarial expansion (50 synthetic) planned post-baseline-lock.

_decision_classes.allow: Hook exits 0 with empty stdout (no decision JSON emitted; tool call proceeds via Claude Code default).
_decision_classes.deny-r32-type: Tier 2 DENY emitted; reason mentions invalid type or missing required fields.
_decision_classes.deny-r32-tags: Tier 2 DENY emitted; reason mentions tag taxonomy prefix mismatch.
_decision_classes.warn-r47: Tier 1 advisory emitted (post-write-verify or reminder); does NOT block. Detected by inspecting hook stdout for advisory-class JSON or tier1 message.
_decision_classes.exempt: R-32/R-47 evaluation skipped (operational file, manifests, root CLAUDE.md, etc.). Hook may still emit reminders for other rules but not R-32/R-47 messaging.
_decision_classes.g1-deny: Plan 71 G1 gate fires (file under $HOME/.claude/, transcript signal matches). Should ONLY occur for fixtures whose file_path is under live ~/.claude/.

fixtures.description: Valid engagement file with all required fields + tags
Valid meeting-note with all required fields
Valid people file with all required fields
Valid daily-note with all required fields (no `type` field — inferred from path)
type: skill-spec (alias) — resolves to reference schema_key for required-field validation
type: overview (alias) — resolves to engagement schema_key
type: foo — not in 26-value allowlist
type: test — not in allowlist
type: engagement, missing required owner + status fields
type: meeting-note, missing required `date` field
Tags with prefix not in 8-dimension taxonomy (#nonexistent/foo)
Valid type, no tags field at all (Tier 1 R-47 advisory)
Valid type, empty tags: [] (Tier 1 R-47 advisory)
Vault root CLAUDE.md — exempt from R-32/R-47 enforcement
Logs/librarian-manifest-foo.md — exempt operational file
Archive/foo.md — R-47 exempt path (folder excluded from advisory)
fixtures._note: Archive/** is in R-47 exempt_paths (no Tier 1 advisory) but NOT in R-32 exempt_paths (Tier 2 still applies if frontmatter has issues). Fixture has valid type so no R-32 issues; R-47 exempt → no advisory either. Net: allow.

fixtures.description: Engagements/Foo/CLAUDE.md — NOT exempt; navigation Tier 2 DENY applies if missing required fields
Valid taxonomy tags in inline list form: [scope/foo, status/in-progress]
Valid taxonomy tags in block list form: tags:\n  - scope/foo
No frontmatter at all (no leading ---) — vault path, .md file
fixtures._note: Hook detects empty FRONTMATTER and skips R-32/R-47 evaluation entirely (lines 778-782).

fixtures.description: File outside VAULT_ROOT — should pass through R-32/R-47 entirely
Plan-tree ideation brief at canonical ~/.claude-plans/ location
Tags/foo.md — R-47 exempt path
Valid scope/foo tag mixed with invented #foo/bar — invalid tag triggers DENY
type: tier-2 (alias) — resolves to reference schema_key

_realignment_note_2026-05-07: Session 1 audit: expected_class fields realigned to match locked baseline observations. Original aspirational predictions preserved as _aspirational_class. Compare-mode runs of decision-equivalence-test.sh now produce zero divergences against current state. T-6 refactor MUST preserve these expected_class values exactly; semantic regressions surface as compare-mode failures.
